reviews.review_description:
I enjoyed playing this app, however, I never knew it was now available on stand alone Q3 until this year. I was very impressed and soooooooo very happy not having to connect to a PC.  These app developers NAILED IT... straight genius.  Feels very realistic and running into a rock and feeling the impact and the swirls and dips was straight genius.  Thank you!!!!

Could I make some suggestions.  Could you create a "night" theme with a big rain storm with lightning and thunder.  A beachy Island environment.  Add tigers, monkeys & alligators to your jungle environment.  Add grizzly bears to your alpine environment.

I find myself coming back to this app more than all the other apps I've used.  It's so adventurous and relaxing at the same time.  It's wonderful.

As for the sound effects, could you make the sounds of the water more realistic, what you have now sounds more like bath water running, no offense please.  The water should sound more aggressive.

Lastly, more... more.. of your fantastic environments.  I don't care how much you charge, it will be worth it.  This app is very much appreciated.

Although it is really fun, it could use more scenes or at least some really low priced expansion packs.

Also, they may need to optimize this a little to prevent occasional pixelization.  Sometimes  it acts like it is trying to draw things in and it hasn't caught up yet.  Recently Meta has unlocked some graphics goodies which may enable this to run a  little better.

This game could be brilliant, but it does some massively annoying things. 

Stop that god awful pop up that tells me how to reset my kayak with the long press left trigger if I get stuck. I will NEVER use the reset, I like getting myself free with my paddle, it’s much more immersive - well, it would be if my screen wasn’t covered in an ugly “tip” that I can’t turn off! Please give us the option to remove this, it’s so ugly and so unnecessary. Maybe just tell us a couple of times, during the tutorial. Not constantly and forever!! 

When a menu pops up (usually because I ran out of time on the time trial) I want to hit the restart button and go again… But, sometimes the restart (and all buttons) are inside a rock. You can still see them, but you can see your “cursor” which makes it shockingly hard to hit the buttons. 

These things aside the game is truly lovely. I’d like to see more levels and some refinements. Sometimes the water splashes look absolutely awful, far too 2D and low definition. And at times the water has extreme angles and straight edges that are begging for a little more curve. 

The handling is ok-ish. It’s certainly not a patch on Kayak VR Mirage on Steam. But I was really pleased to find a decent looking Kayak experience that works on the Q3 without having to go through the pain of getting my headset and gaming laptop to play nicely together. 

Overall this game is a LOT of fun, and also extremely frustrating (not because it’s hard, but because of the stupid decisions to spam me with the hideous reset tip!!) and because the handling isn’t great, so you will miss a lot of the crates that you would have definitely not missed if you were in a real kayak!! 

I was pleased that I could remove the timer in free ride mode. But I want to remove ALL of the onscreen stuff, in every mode! Just me, a kayak, the water, and beautiful scenery please… oh, I almost forgot, I love the fish. 

If you don’t have a gaming PC this is a decent kayaking experience. If you do have a gaming pc then Kayak VR Mirage is a LOT better… but where this beats Mirage hands down is the rapid flow of the water. It’s much better going down rapids than paddling along a level river. 

With some really quick basic tweaks (remove that reset tip!!!) it will instantly be a LOT more immersive and a much more pleasurable experience. And with some hard work on the physics it could be truly brilliant. 

Definitely worth the low price tag, even with the current frustrations.
One of the best games I've ever played
I have a oculus quest 3 got 20 days ago and this game is super good. Great starter game.

I purchased this, thinking it would be like Kayak VR Mirage, on Steam.   It's nothing like it. 

This game is just awkward. The physics are way off.   When you hit a snag and hit the reset button, it places you in exactly the same position to hit the same snag again... and again.... and again. 

Perhaps this is my fault, as I'm using a third party Kayaking adaptor for my controllers. 

I just wish the devs of Kayak VR Mirage would release their app on the Meta Store.

Great game but obstacles kill it from being a fun relaxing experience . There should be an option to remove any obstacles and have a relaxing experience going down the river . And not get hit while trying to avoid unnecessary rocks
Can’t wait for more places !

It took a while to get use to how paddles worked (probably as o.a.p.)but once I did, wow !!! what a rush. ,hard but brilliant….just a pity there is nowhere I  can see in game where my times could be saved ( use piece paper at moment)  my favourite is the eastern Iceland-rapids.really great ……perhaps in the future more locations,but what there is worth the price    Well done the devs

This game is short on content. There should be 3-4 courses per environment and some ability to customize your equipment.

Fun-wise, this game is kind of mid. I’m not convinced the physics are accurate.

There’s a hole in the jungle course, pretty early on, on the right.

reviews.review_title: Amazing kayak game WITH STICK ATTACHMENT
reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing. The immersion is outstanding only if you have a stick attachment. The stick attachments transforms the controllers into a paddle. Btw, I'm using Pro controllers with Quest 3. People might have to use Pro controllers to get the same results because the quest 3 controllers tracking is terrible. I would really really encourage people to experiment and look into meta Quest stick or pole attachments. It makes you feel like you're really kayaking with a real paddle . I would suggest searching for beat saber handles " Darth Maul attachment" 

Please devs, more levels,. PLEASE!!!
I can't stop playing this game. Thank you for making this game

Way more fun than that other PC Kayaking game, as this one sends you down white water rapids.  Lots of variety of environments, long winding levels, beautifully rendered water.  Now I need to build a paddle controller.

Please, developers, make one small change in this game! Please, please, please make it possible to prevent the big written notification that one can escape from a tricky spot by pressing the left trigger from popping up constantly! One already knows about that possibility after the first few times it shows. And it is much more fun and realistic to use the paddle to get out of those spots anyway. After all, pressing the left trigger just puts you back to where you may well get stuck all over again, whereas fighting out of the trap with the paddle gets you past it. AT LEAST PUT IN AN OPTION TO STOP THAT NOTIFICATION SHOWING AFTER THE FIRST FEW TIMES. It really interferes horribly with the otherwise great immersion of the game! A beautiful river but with that big lettering repeatedly hovering over it—not good!

reviews.review_title: Looks just like what was promised
reviews.review_description: The trailers had my hopes up for this kayaking game and I’ve been waiting a couple months for it to come out to try it. It’s beautiful, and I’m glad they made it, it’s worth the 20 dollars if you want a beautiful kayaking game. The way the water flows was really cool cause you could see whirlpools and Eddie’s exactly where you’d think they’d be, very nice water mechanics for making it flow. I would like a couple lake maps where you can explore a bigger body of water as the rivers are pretty linear but when you go through the jungle map and see the ruins and stuff it’s pretty cool. Definitely needs more maps which I’m sure they’ll add but its a pretty game. Also the kayak steering and acceleration could be touched up, I can turn easy but it’s hard to get speed to corner rocks in time

*****Updated. The more I play this, the more I enjoy it.....BUT, of course I want more. Can we have just ONE insane drop? Some big waterfall or something? I haven't tried all of the alternate routes,so maybe it's in there, but I'd love something like that. A little more speed would be nice too. I know there's a balance there for speed and control, but a little more speed would be nice.****

All the maps look great, but that jungle map REALLY stands out. It doesn't just look good, it's interesting too. I especially love the ruins. I do agree with another review that mentioned how it'd be nice to have stronger haptics though. Great job all around.

I can't speak from a professional prospective but as a game I love it .
I love the feel of the challah and very diffrent to most games I've played.
Early days but I'm loving it and it gets 5 stars from me.😄

First of all remarkable job Devs ..seriously getting those water effects & photorealistic scenery on our "phone strapped to our head 3's "😒.. is stellar work 

.. haven't seen many reviews and none by the usual sell out crowd or the "it's looks great for quest " brigade ..they know who they are..as we all do 😒😒how about it simply looks
 great??? 🤷 Not hard is it ? ...anyhoo ...

Would like more controller feedback as the water hitting the paddle would b intense irl but love the genuine feeling of fighting the current to make that turn 

Outstanding graphics the level of detail & scale of each level is staggering 

What a rush this is 👏👏👏

More levels please



Cheers 😎

Very impressive that the devs were able to port this over to Quest headsets. I played it on a Quest 3 and the resolution could be a tad higher but no big there, it still looks pretty good. I would recommend using Quest Games Optimizer - I found that by using the default HD profile the game looks significantly better while still playing smoothly. Adjusting my seating height with in game settings helped correct the issue I had with the controls feeling a bit off at first, but the controls could still be a bit better. Now I'm just anxious for the devs to start adding more beautiful levels that simulate whitewater kayaking through the Grand Canyon and other real world locations. Adding a few more gameplay modes would also help bring more replayability. Great game for a bit of an arm workout if you paddle fast or strap on a pair of wrist weights.

Unfortunately it's pretty buggy and poorly ported. National Geographic game has a much better Kayaking experience, and it's just one of the experiences. You keep clipping though rocks, I'm pretty resistant to motion sickness but this game defeats me. Graphics is pixelated, you can clearly see that they just synthetically down scaled graphics for Quest 3 without optimization. Lazy work.

I waited for a game like this for quest. Beautifully done, scenery and water is amazing my only complaint is the mechanics could be done better as far as paddling backwards. Also the turns should be a little tighter being I kept crashing into the rocks lol Otherwise great game look forward to more DLC's

That’s enough said^^^……… there’s National Geographic where the water looks better but that’s only a 10 minute Kayak experience while this has multiple modes, maps, looks and performs good enough, and during moments going downstreamfeels really engaging.
Beutifull game but it gives me real bad motion sickness
I really like it, but It would be more useful to me, if it were not “Internet Connection Required”…

Don’t normally leave reviews, but this blew me away.

The feeling of being in a kayak, leaning with your body, controlling with your paddles.. all brilliant.

The graphics are great (for a quest 3 I guess).

Doesn’t take that long to open all the courses but it’s such fun I keep going back. Love it!

a few updates and polish, maybe one new course to please the fanbase, and after that a mighty coconut dlc policy..make it fair and we will buy them all:)
pleasently surprised with the water(streaming) physics. its a game of course, but still very intuitive.
keep it up devs:)

It took a little while to get a feel for the controls, but once I did it is a great experience paddling through the beautiful environments! The physics seem solid, and it feels the kayak responds well to the surroundings. Really enjoying it!

reviews.review_title: Fun and lovely, what vr is for!
reviews.review_description: Love this game. Switch off the music and drift through the loveliness! All the fun, therapy and joy, without the capsizing and wet terror of the real experience. This game is absolutely worth it. And I’m normally just a horror/ zombie/ puzzle-type gal! Xx
This game is awesome. I do hope the developer adds some more maps and a free style mode. But overall its very immersive and a great workout.
It’s a nice experience however it could do with much better physics. For the most part I do t actually feel like I’ve got full control of any type of direction.

reviews.review_title: As photorealistic as it can be on Quest3
reviews.review_description: Outstanding how much can be achieved in terms the feeling of being there! I wish more maps are added as an updates.

reviews.review_title: Eww Bit cold 2day think ill geek it
reviews.review_description: This is one I've been waiting for ..no nonsense just plain fast river running providing a spot on work out for your shoulders,back n arms etc...you need really give it some on the paddling to do good times on the time trials..really give it the big uns on the circles especially height and lean lots ...dont advise playing on the sofa as you will prob end up twatting the Mrs on the side of the head...this is my warm up tool before heading out to do real stuff....now can someone please create a sim for surfing and wave sailing please :) gg you will love it
Great looking game , good fun, would feel a lot more fun with controller feedback

reviews.review_title: Amazing for a stand alone headset .
reviews.review_description: This is amazing  to say it's on a mobile chip headset well done to the developers 👍🤝

reviews.review_title: YES YES YES MORE MORE MORE
reviews.review_description: So good , 5 different runs of bliss . Well worth the price , please more more more .
